log: REASONING: Throwing rock at Goblin — Armored Escapist (distant).

→ Rock: [d20:14+9=23 vs AC 20] HIT! 32 damage. Goblin — Armored Escapist HP: 27/59
→ Concentration save: BROKEN! Hypnotic Pattern ends!
REASONING: No concentration active. 3 enemies. Recasting Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 1 remaining). DC 15 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:10+3=13 vs DC 15] FAIL!
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:10+-2=8 vs DC 15] FAIL!
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:15+-2=13 vs DC 15] FAIL!
